---
title: "Cavan Donohoe - Data Scientist"
output:
  html_document:
    includes:
      in_header: header/header.html
      after_body: include_footer.html
lang: "en"
---

```{r structured-data, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
# Add structured data (JSON-LD) for better SEO
cat('
<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "Person",
  "name": "Cavan Donohoe",
  "jobTitle": "Data Scientist",
  "url": "https://cavandonohoe.github.io",
  "sameAs": [
    "https://github.com/cavandonohoe",
    "https://www.linkedin.com/in/cavan-donohoe/",
    "https://www.instagram.com/cavandonohoe",
    "https://www.facebook.com/cavandonohoe"
  ],
  "email": "cavandonohoe@gmail.com",
  "description": "Data Scientist passionate about making workflows easier through automation and reproducible analysis."
}
</script>
')
```

Welcome to my Website! I know it's not much, but it's all done in R and GitHub, so that's pretty cool.

![Sunset at China Walls on Oahu, Hawaii - Reminiscing of my life on Oahu](images/China Walls Sunset.jpg)

I thought it might be worth investing some time to make a website to point to an area of my life where it gets a little more professional. But then I thought, why *just* do that? Why not incorporate some other aspects of my life that makes me me. So yes, this will have my ever growing resume, but let's have a little bit of fun while we're here.

Check out my latest project: a [Rent vs. Buy Calculator](https://cavandonohoe.shinyapps.io/rent-vs-buy/) — an interactive Shiny app that runs a side-by-side financial simulation to help you decide whether to buy a home or keep renting and investing. Source code on [GitHub](https://github.com/cavandonohoe/rent-vs-buy).

## What I've Been Building

Here's my GitHub contribution activity — a live look at the commits behind this site and my other projects. Pick a year to see that year's history.

```{r github-contributions, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
cat('
<div class="gh-cal-wrap">
<div class="gh-cal-card">
<div id="gh-cal-body"><a href="https://github.com/cavandonohoe">Loading GitHub contributions\U2026</a></div>
<div class="gh-cal-footer">
<span id="gh-cal-total"></span>
<span class="gh-cal-legend">Less<span class="gh-cal-swatch" data-lvl="0"></span><span class="gh-cal-swatch" data-lvl="1"></span><span class="gh-cal-swatch" data-lvl="2"></span><span class="gh-cal-swatch" data-lvl="3"></span><span class="gh-cal-swatch" data-lvl="4"></span>More</span>
</div>
</div>
<div class="gh-cal-years" id="gh-cal-years"></div>
</div>
<div class="gh-cal-tooltip" id="gh-cal-tooltip"></div>
<script>
(function() {
  var USER = "cavandonohoe";
  var API = "https://github-contributions-api.jogruber.de/v4/" + USER;
  var THEME = {
    light: ["#ebedf0", "#9be9a8", "#40c463", "#30a14e", "#216e39"],
    dark: ["#161b22", "#0e4429", "#006d32", "#26a641", "#39d353"]
  };
  var CELL = 12, GAP = 3, TOP = 16, LEFT = 24;
  var MONTHS = ["Jan","Feb","Mar","Apr","May","Jun",
                "Jul","Aug","Sep","Oct","Nov","Dec"];
  var DOW = ["","Mon","","Wed","","Fri",""];
  var cache = {};
  var currentYear = "last";
  var body = document.getElementById("gh-cal-body");
  var yearsBox = document.getElementById("gh-cal-years");
  var totalEl = document.getElementById("gh-cal-total");
  var tip = document.getElementById("gh-cal-tooltip");

  function palette() {
    var dark = document.documentElement.getAttribute("data-theme") === "dark";
    return dark ? THEME.dark : THEME.light;
  }

  function paintLegend() {
    var pal = palette();
    var sw = document.querySelectorAll(".gh-cal-swatch");
    for (var i = 0; i < sw.length; i++) {
      sw[i].style.background = pal[+sw[i].getAttribute("data-lvl")];
    }
  }

  function fmtDate(iso) {
    var d = new Date(iso + "T00:00:00");
    return d.toLocaleDateString(undefined,
      { month: "short", day: "numeric", year: "numeric" });
  }

  function render(days) {
    var pal = palette();
    var svgns = "http://www.w3.org/2000/svg";
    var first = new Date(days[0].date + "T00:00:00");
    var startPad = first.getDay();
    var weeks = Math.ceil((days.length + startPad) / 7);
    var w = LEFT + weeks * (CELL + GAP);
    var h = TOP + 7 * (CELL + GAP);
    var svg = document.createElementNS(svgns, "svg");
    svg.setAttribute("class", "gh-cal-svg");
    svg.setAttribute("viewBox", "0 0 " + w + " " + h);
    svg.setAttribute("width", w);

    for (var r = 0; r < 7; r++) {
      if (!DOW[r]) continue;
      var lbl = document.createElementNS(svgns, "text");
      lbl.setAttribute("x", 0);
      lbl.setAttribute("y", TOP + r * (CELL + GAP) + CELL - 1);
      lbl.textContent = DOW[r];
      svg.appendChild(lbl);
    }

    var lastMonth = -1;
    for (var i = 0; i < days.length; i++) {
      var d = days[i];
      var idx = i + startPad;
      var col = Math.floor(idx / 7);
      var row = idx % 7;
      var rect = document.createElementNS(svgns, "rect");
      rect.setAttribute("class", "gh-cal-day");
      rect.setAttribute("width", CELL);
      rect.setAttribute("height", CELL);
      rect.setAttribute("x", LEFT + col * (CELL + GAP));
      rect.setAttribute("y", TOP + row * (CELL + GAP));
      rect.setAttribute("fill", pal[d.level] || pal[0]);
      rect.setAttribute("data-info",
        d.count + (d.count === 1 ? " contribution" : " contributions")
          + " on " + fmtDate(d.date));
      svg.appendChild(rect);

      var m = new Date(d.date + "T00:00:00").getMonth();
      if (m !== lastMonth && row === 0) {
        lastMonth = m;
        var mt = document.createElementNS(svgns, "text");
        mt.setAttribute("x", LEFT + col * (CELL + GAP));
        mt.setAttribute("y", TOP - 5);
        mt.textContent = MONTHS[m];
        svg.appendChild(mt);
      }
    }

    body.innerHTML = "";
    body.appendChild(svg);

    svg.addEventListener("mouseover", function(e) {
      var info = e.target.getAttribute && e.target.getAttribute("data-info");
      if (!info) return;
      tip.textContent = info;
      tip.style.opacity = "1";
    });
    svg.addEventListener("mousemove", function(e) {
      tip.style.left = (e.clientX + 12) + "px";
      tip.style.top = (e.clientY + 12) + "px";
    });
    svg.addEventListener("mouseout", function() { tip.style.opacity = "0"; });
  }

  function show(year, totals) {
    var data = cache.all;
    var days;
    if (year === "last") {
      var cut = new Date();
      cut.setFullYear(cut.getFullYear() - 1);
      days = data.contributions.filter(function(d) {
        return new Date(d.date + "T00:00:00") >= cut;
      });
      totalEl.textContent =
        data.contributions.reduce(function(a, d) {
          return new Date(d.date + "T00:00:00") >= cut ? a + d.count : a;
        }, 0) + " contributions in the last year";
    } else {
      days = data.contributions.filter(function(d) {
        return d.date.slice(0, 4) === String(year);
      });
      totalEl.textContent =
        (totals[year] || 0) + " contributions in " + year;
    }
    render(days);
  }

  function buildYearButtons(totals) {
    var yrs = Object.keys(totals).map(Number).sort(function(a, b) {
      return b - a;
    });
    var opts = [["last", "Last Year"]].concat(yrs.map(function(y) {
      return [y, String(y)];
    }));
    yearsBox.innerHTML = "";
    opts.forEach(function(o) {
      var btn = document.createElement("button");
      btn.className = "gh-cal-year-btn" + (o[0] === currentYear ? " active" : "");
      btn.textContent = o[1];
      btn.setAttribute("title", "View " + o[1]);
      btn.addEventListener("click", function() {
        currentYear = o[0];
        var all = yearsBox.querySelectorAll(".gh-cal-year-btn");
        for (var i = 0; i < all.length; i++) all[i].classList.remove("active");
        btn.classList.add("active");
        show(currentYear, totals);
      });
      yearsBox.appendChild(btn);
    });
  }

  fetch(API)
    .then(function(r) {
      if (!r.ok) throw new Error("fetch failed");
      return r.json();
    })
    .then(function(data) {
      cache.all = data;
      paintLegend();
      buildYearButtons(data.total);
      show(currentYear, data.total);
    })
    .catch(function() {
      body.innerHTML = \'<a href="https://github.com/\' + USER + \'">\'
        + "View my GitHub profile &rarr;</a>";
    });

  // Re-theme when the site dark-mode toggle flips data-theme.
  new MutationObserver(function() {
    paintLegend();
    if (cache.all) show(currentYear, cache.all.total);
  }).observe(document.documentElement,
    { attributes: true, attributeFilter: ["data-theme"] });
})();
</script>
')
```

## Projects

```{r project-cards, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
cards <- list(
  list("us_rental_markets.html", "\U0001F3D8\UFE0F", "US Rental Investment Markets",
    "Cap rates, vacancy, and demand signals for 3,800+ cities using Zillow and Census data."),
  list("la_real_estate.html", "\U0001F3E1", "LA Neighborhoods: Price per Sq Ft",
    "Zillow + Redfin data for LA neighborhoods — median prices, rent, and what $1M buys you."),
  list("https://cavandonohoe.shinyapps.io/rent-vs-buy/", "\U0001F9EE", "Rent vs. Buy Calculator",
    "Interactive Shiny app for side-by-side financial simulation of renting vs. buying."),
  list("imdb_top_250_tv_series.html", "\U0001F4FA", "IMDb Top 250 TV Series",
    "Scraped ratings, seasons, and trends for the top 250 TV shows on IMDb."),
  list("best_picture_nominees.html", "\U0001F3AC", "Best Picture Nominees",
    "Oscar Best Picture data — distributors, producers, and historical nominee analysis."),
  list("top_250_imdb_with_rt.html", "\U0001F37F", "Top 250 IMDb + Rotten Tomatoes",
    "Cross-referencing IMDb's top 250 movies with Rotten Tomatoes scores."),
  list("imdb_rating_plot.html", "\U0001F4C8", "IMDb Rating Plot",
    "Interactive episode-by-episode rating visualization for any TV series."),
  list("avca_all_americans.html", "\U0001F3D0", "AVCA Volleyball All-Americans",
    "Web-scraped history of men's volleyball All-American selections and champions."),
  list("firefighter_schedule.html", "\U0001F692", "Firefighter Schedule",
    "Shift calendar generator for firefighter 48/96 schedules."),
  list("google_maps_saved_places.html", "\U0001F4CD", "Google Maps Saved Places",
    'My "Want to Go" and "Favorites" lists exported and visualized.'),
  list("my_imdb.html", "\U2B50", "My IMDb Ratings",
    "Personal movie ratings and watchlist from my IMDb account."),
  list("my_travels.html", "\U2708\UFE0F", "Get Bloggy With It",
    "Travel blog entries from my adventures around the world."),
  list("best_pic_vs_top_1000.html", "\U0001F39E\UFE0F", "Best Picture vs Top 1000 Box Office",
    "Do Oscar winners also dominate the box office? An interactive comparison."),
  list("sierpinski_triangle.html", "\U0001F53A", "Sierpinski Triangle",
    "Fractal geometry generated in R — the classic chaos game visualization."),
  list("airplane_boarding.html", "\U2708\UFE0F", "Airplane Boarding Simulation",
    "Animated head-to-head race of Steffen, WILMA, Back-to-Front, Reverse Pyramid, and Random."),
  list("confederate_statues.html", "\U0001F5FF", "Confederate Statues Timeline",
    "When were Confederate monuments erected? A data-driven look at the timeline."),
  list("learn_r.html", "\U0001F4DA", "Learn R",
    "Tutorial series: intro, data manipulation, visualization, and statistics in R.")
)

html <- '<div class="project-grid">'
for (card in cards) {
  html <- paste0(html, sprintf(
    '<a class="project-card" href="%s"><div class="card-icon">%s</div><h3>%s</h3><p>%s</p></a>',
    card[[1]], card[[2]], card[[3]], card[[4]]
  ))
}
html <- paste0(html, '</div>')
cat(html)
```
